task.summary:
Remove foreign key from refresh_tokens table
This migration drops the foreign key constraint `refresh_tokens_user_id_fkey` on the `refresh_tokens` table. The downgrade step restores the constraint with `CASCADE` rules for updates and deletes.

Refactor user management and enhance authentication flows
Replaced deprecated database fetch methods and refined user creation logic. Added login and logout functionality with token handling, streamlined email verification, and improved password reset flow. This update ensures better modularity, security, and maintainability.

Clean up workspace.xml change list comments
Removed verbose and unnecessary comments from the `.idea/workspace.xml` file to streamline the project configuration. This helps reduce clutter and focus on essential settings.

Remove `env.yaml` and update `.gitignore`
Deleted `env.yaml` containing sensitive information and added it to `.gitignore` to prevent accidental inclusion in the repository. This improves security and aligns with best practices for handling environment variables.

Add `python-magic` dependency to project
`python-magic` has been added to the dependency files `uv.lock` and `pyproject.toml` with version `0.4.27`. This ensures the required library is available for handling file type magic numbers.

Add Rekognition integration and photo quality checks for users
Implemented AWS Rekognition-based face detection and photo quality validation in user registration. Added S3 integration to upload profile images and updated the user creation workflow to handle image processing and storage. Adjusted schemas and repositories to accommodate these changes.

Add file upload support to user creation endpoint
Updated the `/create-user` endpoint to accept a file upload alongside user data. Introduced a `photo_ref_upload` parameter and modified dependencies to include structured form data for user creation.
feat: link college and department models using relationships
feat: validation schemas for college and departments
feat: add router, service and repo functions for getting list of colleges

MESSAGE.value:
Remove foreign key from refresh_tokens table
This migration drops the foreign key constraint `refresh_tokens_user_id_fkey` on the `refresh_tokens` table. The downgrade step restores the constraint with `CASCADE` rules for updates and deletes.

Refactor user management and enhance authentication flows
Replaced deprecated database fetch methods and refined user creation logic. Added login and logout functionality with token handling, streamlined email verification, and improved password reset flow. This update ensures better modularity, security, and maintainability.

Clean up workspace.xml change list comments
Removed verbose and unnecessary comments from the `.idea/workspace.xml` file to streamline the project configuration. This helps reduce clutter and focus on essential settings.

Remove `env.yaml` and update `.gitignore`
Deleted `env.yaml` containing sensitive information and added it to `.gitignore` to prevent accidental inclusion in the repository. This improves security and aligns with best practices for handling environment variables

Add Rekognition API routes for liveness detection
Introduced routes to create liveness detection sessions and retrieve results using AWS Rekognition. Included logic to store the reference image from the session results.

Add `python-magic` dependency to project
`python-magic` has been added to the dependency files `uv.lock` and `pyproject.toml` with version `0.4.27`. This ensures the required library is available for handling file type magic numbers.

Add Rekognition integration and photo quality checks for users
Implemented AWS Rekognition-based face detection and photo quality validation in user registration. Added S3 integration to upload profile images and updated the user creation workflow to handle image processing and storage. Adjusted schemas and repositories to accommodate these changes.

Add file upload support to user creation endpoint
Updated the `/create-user` endpoint to accept a file upload alongside user data. Introduced a `photo_ref_upload` parameter and modified dependencies to include structured form data for user creation.
feat: link college and department models using relationships
feat: validation schemas for college and departments
feat: add router, service and repo functions for getting list of colleges
